Description:
Ballistic of the 37mm automatic air defense gun M1939 (61-K) firing the 37x252mmSR HEIT(SD) shell UOR-167. Performance of the following cartridges may be produced by manipulating this entry (uncheck "Constrain Design" first):

Projectile		Type	Shot	Prop	C.V.	M.V.	P.mcp
			g	g	mL	m/s	kgf/cm²
-- USSR Designs --
UP-167		HET	732	205	273	880	2800 
UBR-167		APT	758	205	263	880	2900
UOR-167		HEI	732	205	273	880	2800
-- PRC Designs --
WB021APG		.. as UP-167
WB105PG		.. as UBR-167
WB119PG		APHET	755	205	278	868	2900
WB030P		.. as UOR-167

Pressure specification is from copper-crusher gauge. A cardboard spacer is present in the UOR-167 allowing ballistics to be matched despite the difference in projectile mass. Grain geometry is as follows:

Geometry:			14-perf Rosette
Arch Width:			0.7-0.85 mm 
Perforation Diameter:			0.3-0.45 mm 
Length:        			8.0-11.0 mm
Dimensions of the M1939 (61-K) is as follows:
Gun Length:			2739 mm (breech block to muzzle)
Barrel Length:			2315 mm
Projectile Travel:			2099 mm
Chamber Length:			216 mm
Chambrage:			1.14

This entry also applies to:
Model		Application		Mount	Remark
-- Union of Soviet Socialist Republic --
70-K		Naval AA		Single	Identical to 61-K in ballistics
V-11(M)		Naval AA		Dual	... as above
46-K		Naval AA		Quad	... as above
-- People's Republic of China --
Type 55		Divisional AA		Single	Reverse engineered from 61-K
Type 65(-1)		Divisional AA		Dual	Developed from Type 55
Type 74		Divisional AA		Dual	Improved from Type 65 with radar direction & increased RoF
Type 74 SD		Divisional AA		Dual	Simplified from Type 74, manually directed.
Type 61		Naval AA		Dual	Reverse engineered from V-11M, modified for compatibility with Type 55

References:
- 《火炸药手册 第二分册 固体火箭推进剂和枪炮发射药》第五机械工业部第二零四研究所，1981
- 《国产火炮手册》兵器工业部第二管理局，1982
- 《炮弹火箭手册》兵器工业部第三管理局，1984
- 《火炮内弹道计算手册》王连荣，张佩勤，国防工业出版社，1987
- 《中国舰艇工业历史资料丛书》，中国船舶工业总公司，1993
- Soviet Cannon: A Comprehensive Study of Soviet Guns and Ammunition in Calibres 12.7mm to 57mm, Christian Koll, 2009
